files.notes: This file contains the end of an editorial article 'On the Watch Tower' by James H. Anderson, followed by multiple Guide Lessons sections. The lessons include Genealogy (Lesson I), Work and Business (Lesson II), Book of Mormon study on 'The Land of Joseph' (Lesson III), and Social Service on Health/Malnutrition (Lesson IV). The lessons are grouped together as they form a cohesive instructional unit.
